tasks.label: Open Test Clients
tasks.command: open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000 && open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: Open Test Clients (Separate Sessions)
tasks.command: open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000 && open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --incognito --new-window http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: Open N Test Clients
tasks.command: for i in $(seq 1 ${input:numClients}); do open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000; done

tasks.label: Build, Start & Open Clients
tasks.command: nohup ./start.sh > /tmp/start-server.log 2>&1 & sleep 20 && open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000 && open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000

tasks.label: Build, Start & Open N Clients
tasks.command: nohup ./start.sh > /tmp/start-server.log 2>&1 & sleep 20 && for i in $(seq 1 ${input:numClients}); do open -na 'Google Chrome' --args --new-window http://localhost:3000; done

inputs.description: Number of test clients to open
